summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RAMP Proof of Value dashboard. All 13 backend tests passed and UI E2E testing confirmed all features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Tests use /api/system/demo/complete-verification-flow endpoint which creates and verifies test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Proof of Value dashboard features verified. Key endpoints: GET /api/system/value-summary (returns all 4 sections: value_at_risk, top_actions, recovered_value, loop_integrity), POST /api/system/demo/complete-verification-flow (Run Demo), POST /api/how/interventions (Create Intervention). All data-testid attributes working correctly.
passed_tests: TestValueSummaryEndpoint::test_value_summary_has_required_sections - All 4 sections present (value_at_risk, top_actions, recovered_value, loop_integrity)
TestValueSummaryEndpoint::test_value_at_risk_structure - VaR section has total_per_day, active_priorities, breakdown_by_band
TestValueSummaryEndpoint::test_top_actions_structure - Actions have priority_id, asset_name, value_at_risk_per_day, confidence, confidence_band
TestValueSummaryEndpoint::test_recovered_value_structure - Recovered section has total_savings, verified_outcomes_count, recent_outcomes with savings and time_to_verify
TestValueSummaryEndpoint::test_loop_integrity_structure - Loop integrity has verified/pending/insufficient_data counts, verification_rate_percent, status
TestValueSummaryEndpoint::test_loop_status_based_on_verification_rate - Status correctly reflects rate (>=70% HEALTHY, >=40% DEGRADED, <40% POOR)
TestRunDemoEndpoint::test_run_demo_creates_full_flow - Creates complete baseline→state→priority→intervention→outcome chain with VERIFIED status
TestRunDemoEndpoint::test_run_demo_updates_value_summary - Demo updates verified count and total savings
TestInterventionCreation::test_intervention_creation - POST /api/how/interventions creates intervention with frozen baseline
TestValueBreakdownByBand::test_var_breakdown_sums_to_total - VaR breakdown by band sums to total
frontend_tests_passed: data-testid=loop-status - Shows HEALTHY/DEGRADED/POOR badge with correct color
data-testid=verified-outcomes-list - List of verified outcomes with savings and time to verify
data-testid=take-action-0 - Take Action button opens intervention modal
data-testid=intervention-modal - Modal with type select, description textarea, submit button
data-testid=submit-intervention - Enabled when description is filled

features_verified.value_at_risk_section: Shows total VaR/day ($25.25) with breakdown by band (HIGH: $25)
features_verified.top_priority_actions: Shows assets with value at risk, confidence band, Take Action button
features_verified.value_recovered_section: Shows verified outcomes with savings (+7.0 kWh), confidence (99%), time to verify (2h)
features_verified.loop_integrity: Shows verified/pending/insufficient counts, verification rate (100%), HEALTHY status badge
features_verified.take_action_button: Opens intervention modal with type select, description field, submit button
features_verified.loop_status_badge: Shows HEALTHY with green color when verification rate >= 70%
